About Me

Who I Am

I'm an AI/ML Engineer proficient in Python, Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning, and Quantum AI — completing my B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at Garden City University, Bengaluru.

My work spans from building LLMs and computer vision systems to architecting scalable backend infrastructures. I've led Smart India Hackathon teams and authored research in Quantum Neural Networks.

I combine rigorous engineering with creative problem-solving — from training a robotic locomotion agent via TD3 to pioneering hybrid Quantum-Classical fraud detection systems.

Published Work

Research

Research Paper

Improvising Quantum Neural Network for Fraud Detection

Pioneers a hybrid Quantum Generative Adversarial Network (QGAN) combined with Quantum Reservoir Computing to detect financial fraud anomalies. Leverages quantum superposition and entanglement to explore feature spaces exponentially larger than classical approaches.

DomainQuantum Machine Learning
MethodsQGAN · Quantum Reservoir Computing · Qiskit
StatusSubmitted for Publication
Quantum ComputingQGANAnomaly DetectionQiskit
